subcodes.first_line: O Letter of Submission! Hearken unto My call and be not of them that tarry. Grieve not over aught, but place thy trust in Me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا حرف التسلیم اسمع ندائی و لاتکن من الصابرین الا تحزن فی شیء فتوکل علی
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love of God, @chastisement and requital, @wisdom [hikmat], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
